misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Pasi, affectionately known as "Susi-Pasi" among his peers, is a formidable presence on the golf course, hailing from the esteemed Vuosaari Golf Helsinki. While he is celebrated for his contributions to the sport, some fans playfully question his dedication to golf, considering his even greater passion for basketball. One might even say that Pasi loves basketball more than Marcus, which is really saying something!

Beyond his athletic interests, Pasi has proven his mettle in the Hector Trophée, having participated in 4 editions of the tournament. His crowning achievement came when he secured the coveted Hector Trophée title once, a testament to his skill and competitive spirit. Although the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, his determination suggests that it may very well be within his reach in the future.
While Pasi will not be participating in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, the possibility of a last-minute change leaves fans hopeful for his return to the competition.
